_meta.description: Expert-validated scenarios for evaluating the free-text classifier. 'text' is a realistic business description; 'expected' is the entity a domain reading of the rules assigns; 'difficulty' is 'easy' (keyword-obvious) or 'hard' (synonyms, indirect phrasing, or mixed signals that stress the matcher and exercise the fallback path).
